overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a dark coat walking along a dirt path through a grassy, rocky landscape at night. The character approaches a lit torch mounted on a wooden fence and continues toward a distant stone castle with glowing windows, set against a cloudy dark blue sky.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a grassy landscape at night. A rocky cliff face looms on the left while tall grass and bushes line the right. At around 6 seconds, a bright flash of light briefly illuminates the scene before returning to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside wooden fence with lit torch

events.description: lit torch on wooden fence becomes visible in the distance ahead
character passes the lit torch, moving from approaching to passing it on the left

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the path, approaching and then passing a torch mounted on a fence

entered.detail: wooden post with bright orange flame providing warm light against the cool night
simple wooden fence posts running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a lit torch mounted on a wooden fence that runs along the left side of the path. The warm orange glow of the torch contrasts with the cool blue moonlight. The character passes the torch and continues along the fenced path as the rocky cliff recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal path approaching stone fortress

events.description: distant stone castle with illuminated windows becomes visible ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily toward the distant castle, with the ocean visible in the background

entered.detail: medieval stone fortress with glowing orange windows perched on rocky cliffs
dark blue sea visible in the distance beyond the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal a coastal view with a large stone castle perched on cliffs ahead. The wooden fence continues along the left but becomes more distant. The castle's illuminated windows glow warmly against the dark stone as the character approaches, with the ocean visible in the background under the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark wilderness trail that gradually opens into a vista of a coastal fortress. It begins with a character walking a narrow dirt path between a looming rocky cliff and dense brush, where a sudden flash of light briefly pierces the nocturnal gloom. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a warm orange glow from a lit torch mounted on a wooden fence, contrasting with the cool blue moonlight as the cliff face recedes. The path then expands to reveal a wide coastal view, with the wooden fence trailing off as a massive stone castle comes into focus. Finally, the camera moves toward the fortress, its illuminated windows glowing warmly against the dark stone and a cloudy night sky over the distant ocean.
